description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the danlynn/ember-cli:2.18.0 Docker image. Define two stages: test and deploy, and a global before_script that runs `rm -rf node_modules && npm install` before each job. Add a test job named test in the test stage that runs on docker runners and executes `ember test`. Add a deploy job named deploy in the deploy stage that runs on docker runners, targets the production environment, is manual, only runs on tags, and runs `echo $NPM_CREDENTIALS > ~/.npmrc` followed by `npm publish` to publish the package using the NPM_CREDENTIALS secret.
